gaps.title: All three rarity sections (Uncommon / Rare / Legendary) with 12 card tiles are missing
gaps.detail: Live page body (below the hero banner) is three stacked sections, each with a small left-aligned heading — 'Uncommon', 'Rare', 'Legendary' — followed by a row of 4 dark rounded tiles (1 column at 390, 4 columns at 1440 and 3840). Each tile contains: a slabbed (PSA-style) card image centered on a dark panel, a left-aligned name label ('Eevee GX #1'–'#4' under Uncommon, 'Pikachu VMAX #1'–'#4' under Rare, 'Charizard GX #1'–'#4' under Legendary), a faint thin sub-row between the name and the button (content unreadable at capture scale — pull exact text from live DOM), and a full-width pill 'Play Roulette' button at the tile bottom. The clone has NONE of this — its body is a single roulette carousel + one CTA (see extra-section gaps). The tier names/percentages in the clone's chips (Legendary/Rare/Uncommon) suggest the section names were known but the grid was never built.

gaps.title: Hero banner panel missing — clone replaces it with plain centered text
gaps.detail: Live top-of-page is a full-width rounded dark banner card (sits below the header with a margin) containing: a small yellow icon badge (sparkle-like, rounded square) above the heading, LEFT-aligned heading 'Pokemon Card Roulette', subtitle 'Test your luck and win exclusive Pokemon cards!', and a large dark card-artwork image filling the banner's center/right (at 390 the artwork sits above/behind the text). The clone instead renders a bare CENTERED h1 + centered subtitle on the page background — no banner panel, no icon badge, no artwork (RouletteClient.tsx lines 57-59).

gaps.title: Clone-only roulette carousel window (fabricated)
gaps.detail: Clone renders a rounded dark 'roulette window' with a horizontal strip of ~8+ slab thumbnails in colored rarity borders and a white center marker line + triangle pointer (RouletteClient.tsx lines 71-89). Nothing like this exists anywhere on the live page. Must be removed when the page is rebuilt to the live grid structure.

gaps.title: Clone-only odds chips row and single gradient 'Play Roulette' CTA (fabricated)
gaps.detail: Clone shows three pill chips under the subtitle ('Legendary · 1%', 'Rare · 9%', 'Uncommon · 90%', lines 61-69) and one centered fuchsia-violet gradient 'Play Roulette' button below the carousel (line 107). Live has neither — on live, 'Play Roulette' exists only as a per-tile button inside each of the 12 card tiles, and no odds chips appear at the top of the page.

gaps.title: Fabricated disclaimer copy 'Demo only — real roulette & provably-fair odds arrive with the backend.'
gaps.detail: Small grey text line at the bottom of the clone's content area (RouletteClient.tsx line 111). Does not exist on live. Remove with the rest of the fabricated demo UI.

gaps.title: Subtitle copy drops the word 'Pokemon'
gaps.detail: Live subtitle: 'Test your luck and win exclusive Pokemon cards!'. Clone (RouletteClient.tsx line 59): 'Test your luck and win exclusive cards!'. Note: under the rebrand convention this site keeps Pokemon-related words, so the word should be restored.

gaps.title: Heading spelling: live reads 'Pokemon Card Roulette' (no accent), clone uses 'Pokémon'
gaps.detail: At 1440 and 3840 the live heading appears to be 'Pokemon Card Roulette' without the é accent; clone h1 (line 58) and page metadata (page.tsx line 5) use 'Pokémon'. Confirm exact glyph from live DOM text content before changing — capture resolution makes the accent hard to be 100% certain of.

gaps.title: Clone renders the full site footer; no footer visible in any live capture
gaps.detail: Clone shows the standard site footer (brand blurb, About Us, Quick Links, Support, Social Media, copyright) at all breakpoints. None of the three live captures show a footer — but the 390 and 1440 live shots appear height-truncated mid-content (cut through the Legendary tiles), and the 3840 live shot ends flush at the Legendary row, so footer absence is NOT confirmed. Verify on the live site (does /roulette include the global footer?) before removing anything. Flagged needsMeasurement to force that live-DOM check.

gaps.title: Mobile (390) header: live shows icon nav + Login + Sign Up buttons; clone shows only logo + hamburger
gaps.detail: Live 390 top bar: compact logo, a row of small nav icons, then 'Login' and 'Sign Up' buttons on the right. Clone 390 top bar: POKENIC logo left, hamburger icon right, no auth buttons visible. This is the shared site header (SiteHeader), so it is almost certainly a site-wide gap, not roulette-specific — coordinate with other route audits before fixing here. Presence/absence judged from pixels; if acting, confirm the live mobile header composition via live DOM first.

/roulette.notes: No cookie banner or region popup in any live capture. Page is NOT auth-gated on live — the full grid renders anonymously, so the clone must too. Branding (phygitals→Pokenic logo/wordmark) is the project's intentional rebrand, not counted as a gap; the clone footer's '© 2025 PHYGITALS' line matches live convention elsewhere. Live captures at 390 and 1440 appear height-truncated mid-content (cut through tiles), so anything about page bottom (footer presence) needs live verification. All 12 live tiles appear to share the same dark slab artwork (possibly one asset or a video poster) — grab the real asset(s) from live network requests during rebuild. Clone source to rewrite: C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/roulette/RouletteClient.tsx (entire body is an invented demo spinner; the spin interaction, win state, 'Spin again'/'View card' buttons at lines 92-110 are all fabricated). Per repo rules, verify the rebuild against the production server on :4000 with the scripts/*.mjs Playwright flow, not Chrome MCP.

gaps.title: Clone renders fabricated 'Live Draws' page; live route is a 404
gaps.detail: Live https://www.phygitals.com/lucky-draw does not exist — it renders the site's custom 404 page at every breakpoint. The clone (C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/lucky-draw/page.tsx) instead shows an invented full feature page: 'Live Draws' h1 with ticket icon, subtitle 'Enter for a chance to win graded cards. Every ticket counts.', 'How It Works' + 'Create Draw' buttons, Live/Ended and All/Graded/Ungraded filter pills, sort dropdown, and a responsive grid (1-col at 390, 5-col at 1440/3840) of ~14 graded-card raffle tiles built from MOCK_CARDS with 'Enter $X' prices and countdowns. None of this exists on live. Same anonymous-view precedent as the /fairness fix: the clone must show what an anonymous visitor sees — here, the 404.

gaps.title: Live custom 404 design missing from clone (no not-found.tsx exists)
gaps.detail: What live actually shows on /lucky-draw and what the clone must reproduce: (1) centered dark 'vault slab' 404 graphic — a rounded card with pixel-font header strip (mobile 390 reads '✦ VAULT  GRADE: NOT FOUND'; desktop reads a similar pixel-text strip), inner screen with small caps line ('NO CARD ON FILE' on 390 / 'WE LOOKED FOR FILE' on 1440/3840), huge metallic '404', 'SLOT EMPTY' below, and a 'CERT ▮OOOOOOOOO' barcode-style row at the slab's base; (2) heading 'Page not found.' in the heading font; (3) body copy 'The page you're after has moved, been pulled, or never existed. Plenty of others are still waiting for their next mail day.'; (4) two buttons — green pill 'Back to marketplace →' and dark/neutral 'Go home'; (5) small-caps divider label 'OPEN ONE OF THESE INSTEAD' followed by three pack cards in a row (3-up even at 390 with truncated labels): 'Pokemon Elite' (red pack), 'One Piece Mythic' (teal holo pack), 'Basketball Pro' (green GRAILS pack), each with name + arrow link; (6) standard site footer below. Glob over src/app/**/not-found.tsx in the clone repo returns nothing, so this 404 design does not exist anywhere — fixer should build it (ideally as the global src/app/not-found.tsx so all dead routes match live) and remove/redirect the fabricated lucky-draw page so the route 404s.

/lucky-draw.notes: Live /lucky-draw is a hard 404 at all three breakpoints — the page genuinely does not exist on phygitals.com (not an auth wall; no login prompt, just 'Page not found.'). No cookie banners or region popups in any live shot. The 3840 live shot shows the same 404 centered full-bleed with the 3-column footer (Quick Links / Support / Social Media). Clone header shows Pokenic branding per the intentional rebrand — not a gap. Per-element spacing/typography of the 404 slab was not measured (judged from pixels only); if the fixer wants exact computed CSS for the slab/buttons, capture it from the live 404 with the scripts/*.mjs measurement flow. Recommended fix shape: delete or 404 the src/app/lucky-draw route and implement the phygitals 404 as src/app/not-found.tsx so every nonexistent route matches live (precedent: /fairness anonymous-view fix).

gaps.title: Entire page concept is wrong — live is a standalone game-world scene with a retro OS-window dialog, clone is a generic dark site page
gaps.detail: Live /30th is a full-viewport standalone page: a blurred pixel-art Pokemon-style game world (village houses, windmill, trees, ocean) fills the screen, with a single centered retro-OS window dialog on top. The clone instead renders a normal site page (header + dark hero card + extra sections + footer) built from invented components in src/app/30th/page.tsx. Nothing on the clone page matches the live page's structure; it needs a full rebuild, not patches.

gaps.title: Missing blurred pixel-art game-world background
gaps.detail: Live's page background (the entire viewport behind the dialog) is a pixel-art village scene — red/orange-roofed houses, a windmill upper-center, trees, dirt paths, ocean strip at the top — rendered blurred. The clone has no such background; it shows the site's neutral-900 dark background with a blurred ripped-pack image only inside the hero card. The live background asset needs to be captured from the live site (likely an image or canvas under a blur overlay).

gaps.title: Clone shows site header and footer; live has neither
gaps.detail: Live /30th renders no global nav and no footer — the game scene + dialog occupy the whole viewport. The clone wraps the page in the standard SiteHeader (Pokenic logo + nav, top of page) and SiteFooter (quick links/support/social, bottom). Both must be suppressed on this route, similar to a standalone layout.

gaps.title: Missing retro OS-window chrome (title bar, 30th badge, traffic-light dots)
gaps.detail: Live's centered dialog has a dark rounded title bar containing: a circular gold/red '30th' anniversary badge logo at left, title '30th Edition' in white pixel/monospace font with subtitle 'Pokemon 30th Anniversary' in small gray below it, and three macOS-style traffic-light dots (yellow/orange, red, green) at the right edge. The clone has no window chrome at all — it uses a borderless dark hero card.

gaps.title: Missing pixel-sprite row (Venusaur, Blastoise, gold trophy, Mewtwo, Mew)
gaps.detail: Top of the live dialog body shows five pixel-art sprites in a row: Venusaur (with flower), Blastoise, a larger gold pixel trophy in the center, Mewtwo, and Mew. The clone replaces this with a single Lucide Trophy icon inside an amber rounded square — wrong imagery entirely. Sprite assets need to be pulled from the live page.

gaps.title: Dialog body is white with black pixel-font heading on live; clone uses dark card with white Nekst heading
gaps.detail: Live: white dialog body, heading 'Prizes Have Been Picked!' in a black pixel/monospace font (wraps to two lines), gray secondary text. Clone: dark neutral-950 card, heading in white Nekst (font-heading) at 4xl-6xl. Both the surface color and the typeface family are wrong. Head to our announcement channel for the full breakdown of winners and prizes.' — fabricated text, longer and different. gaps.title: CTA area wrong: live has one Discord-blurple button with Discord logo + 'discord.gg/phygitals' caption; clone has white button (no logo) plus an extra 'View Leaderboard' button
gaps.detail: Live dialog bottom: a single rounded Discord-brand-blurple button labeled 'View Winners on Discord' with the Discord mark at left, and a small light-gray caption link 'discord.gg/phygitals' centered beneath it. Clone: white pill button 'View Winners on Discord' with no Discord logo (href='#'), an additional outlined 'View Leaderboard' button that does not exist on live, and no discord.gg caption. Button color is a color claim — confirm exact blurple via getComputedStyle. Per repo rebrand convention the caption brand string may become 'discord.gg/pokenic'.

gaps.title: Fabricated 'This edition's prize pool' section
gaps.detail: Below the hero card the clone renders a 'This edition's prize pool' label with five fanned pack/slab images (PRIZES array in src/app/30th/page.tsx). Live has no such section — nothing exists outside the centered dialog. Remove it.

gaps.title: Dialog sizing/position across breakpoints
gaps.detail: On live-390 the dialog is near full-width and pinned toward the top of the viewport; at 1440/3840 it is a compact fixed-ish width window centered horizontally and roughly vertically. When rebuilding, measure the live dialog's width/max-width, border-radius, and vertical offset per breakpoint rather than guessing.

/30th.notes: No cookie banners or region popups in any live shot. Live /30th is a standalone full-viewport experience (no global header/footer) — the clone must opt out of the SiteHeader/SiteFooter shell for this route. The faint '© 20xx Phygitals Inc' text visible in live-390's background is part of the blurred underlying scene, not a separate footer element. Branding: clone uses the intentional Pokenic rebrand (header wordmark, metadata); brand-string swaps (phygitals→pokenic, e.g. in 'discord.gg/phygitals') are repo convention, not gaps — but everything else (pixel font, white window, sprites, blurple Discord button) must match live. Live's heading/title-bar use a pixel/monospace font not currently in the project (Nekst/Geist only) — the fixer must extract the actual font from live. Clone source is C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/30th/page.tsx; it is an invented composition (Lucide Trophy, Reveal fan of PRIZES images) and should be rebuilt from a fresh live recon (scripts/*.mjs Playwright capture) rather than patched.

gaps.title: Anonymous /referrals landing page missing entirely — clone redirects to home + login modal
gaps.detail: Live (anonymous) shows a PUBLIC referrals landing page: (1) full-bleed dimmed background grid of badge/medallion/trophy artwork tiles; (2) a centered dark glass hero panel containing a small leaf/plant icon, heading 'Invite Friends, Earn Together', a yellow-to-pink gradient pill CTA 'Sign Up to Earn' with a small caption line beneath it, two side-by-side stat chips ('Total Invited' and 'Current Rank', shown empty/zero for anonymous users), a 'Lifetime Earnings' row, and a green-tinted note reading approximately 'Earn 1% on all your friend's purchases from the claw machine. Earnings are paid out quarterly.'; (3) a 'Top Referrers' section (subtitle ~'Leading collectors this month') with a RANK / USER / REFERRALS table of 10 rows — medal icons for #1-#3, circular avatars, referral counts (live capture showed roughly #1 11969, #2 2146, #3 1626, then 958, 598, 583, 547, 465, 347, 307); (4) the standard site footer. The clone instead shows the HOME page (hero 'Flip packs, Pull graded cards', Best Packs grid, Recent Pulls, leaderboard) dimmed under a 'Welcome back' login modal at every breakpoint — i.e. /referrals never renders. Root cause in source: src/app/(account)/layout.tsx calls redirect('/?auth=login') for unauthenticated visitors, and /referrals lives in that (account) route group. Fix per the /fairness precedent: /referrals must be a public route matching the live anonymous view, not an auth-gated one.

/referrals.notes: No cookie banner or region popup in either set of shots. Live shots at all three breakpoints are consistent (same sections, just responsive scaling; at 3840 the hero panel and Top Referrers table stay a narrow centered column over the tiled badge background). The clone screenshots are the home page + AuthModal, a capture consequence of the redirect in C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/(account)/layout.tsx — so no per-element comparison of /referrals itself is possible; every sub-element listed in the gap is currently missing. Secondary source-level issue for the fixer: the gated C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/(account)/referrals/page.tsx fabricates a logged-in dashboard (mock 'Invited 14 / Active 9 / Earned $642.50 / Rate 5%' stats, a 'pokenic.com/invite/662b59' copy-link panel, 'Invited collectors' avatar grid, DemoNote) that matches nothing on live — it should be replaced by the public landing page above, not kept behind the gate. Referral-count figures and exact caption wording under the CTA were read from downscaled captures; the fixer should re-extract exact copy/numbers from the live DOM rather than trusting my OCR, but these are content reads, not computed-style claims, hence needsMeasurement=false on the structural gap.

gaps.title: Wrong page: clone shows auth wall over homepage instead of the public Pokecoin Market grid
gaps.detail: Live /pokecoin is fully PUBLIC for anonymous visitors at all three breakpoints: standard site header (desktop: phygitals logo / Packs NEW / Pack Party / Marketplace / Leaderboard / More; mobile 390: hamburger + logo + '?' help + Login + Sign Up), an H1 'Pokécoin Market' top-left under the header, then a responsive grid of Gen-1 Pokémon market cards in National Pokédex order (Bulbasaur #1 through Mew #151 — Mew is the last card at 1440). Each card: Pokémon sprite top-left, bold name, '$ <price>' to 4 decimals under the name (e.g. Bulbasaur '$ 0.6659'), a SUPPLY label/value (e.g. '20.38M') and MKT CAP label/value (full value at 3840 e.g. '$13,569,430.52', ellipsis-truncated at 1440/390), and a green sparkline price chart inside an inset rounded-bordered box filling the card bottom. Grid is 2 columns at 390 and 7 columns at 1440 and 3840 (wider cards at 4K). The clone instead renders the HOME page (hero 'Flip packs. Pull graded cards.', Best Packs, Recent Pulls, leaderboard, footer) dimmed behind a 'Welcome back' login modal (Google/Discord buttons, Email, Password, Forgot password?, Log in, 'New to Pokenic? Sign up') at every breakpoint. The entire market page is absent. Root cause: the route lives in the auth-gated (account) route group — C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/(account)/pokecoin/page.tsx — but live does NOT gate this route. Fix = move /pokecoin out of the (account) group into a public route and build the Pokécoin Market grid page.

gaps.title: Fabricated logged-in 'PokéCoin' balance/transactions page in clone source
gaps.detail: The clone's underlying route component (C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/(account)/pokecoin/page.tsx) renders invented logged-in content that exists nowhere on live: AccountHeader titled 'PokéCoin' with sub 'Earn coins on every purchase...', an amber Coins-icon balance card showing '48,250 PKC' with a 'Redeem' button, a 5-row mock transaction table (dates 2026-05/06, 'Pack purchase reward +250' etc.), and a DemoNote. This is currently hidden behind the auth modal in the screenshots, but it violates the anonymous-view rule (same class of error as the /fairness fix) and must be deleted/replaced wholesale by the public Pokécoin Market grid described in gap 1 — do not keep it as the logged-in variant, since live's anonymous view IS the market grid.

/pokecoin.notes: No cookie banner or region popup in any live shot — the 'Welcome back' modal in the clone shots is the clone's own auth wall, i.e. the gap itself, not a capture artifact. Live data on this page is dynamic (prices, supply, mkt cap, sparklines are live market values); the clone should snapshot static plausible data in the same format ('$ x.xxxx' price, M-suffixed supply, full-dollar mkt cap, green downsampled sparkline). Column counts observed from pixels (2 @390, 7 @1440, 7 wider @3840) suggest an auto-fill/minmax grid — fixer should measure grid-template-columns/card width/gap with getComputedStyle on live before hardcoding breakpoint column counts. live-3840 is a viewport-height capture (3840x2160), live-390 is capped at 12000px tall — neither shows whether a site footer follows the grid (none visible at the live-1440 bottom, which ends at the Mew card); fixer should verify footer presence on live before adding one. Clone screenshots at 1440/3840 only show the modal viewport; underlying fabricated page content was confirmed from source, not pixels.

The clone (src/app/airdrop/page.tsx) instead renders a rounded-2xl bordered hero card with a purple radial glow, spinning purple Gift icon, fuchsia eyebrow text, a large headline 'Free cards are dropping soon', subcopy 'Reserve your spot now and claim a free graded card when the airdrop goes live.', and a fuchsia-to-violet gradient button — none of which exist on live. AIRDROP' wording suggests the live page is a loading/teaser state and the bar (and possibly the floating icons) may be animated — fixer should recapture live with video or check docs/research/BEHAVIORS.md before hard-coding a static bar. gaps.title: Entire page body is fabricated mock content, not the live series accordion index
gaps.detail: Live shows a stacked accordion list of 16 real Pokemon TCG series/eras, in this order top-to-bottom: Scarlet & Violet, Sword & Shield, Other (Match Battle logo), Sun & Moon, XY, Black & White, HeartGold & SoulSilver, Platinum, POP, Diamond & Pearl, EX, NP (PROMO logo), E-Card (Skyridge logo), Neo, Gym, Base. Each row has: the series wordmark/logo image on the left, the series name, metadata chips (calendar icon + year range e.g. '2023 - 2023', '0 / 18 sets', '0 / 3,618 cards' — the 0/N is the ANONYMOUS view, zero owned), and a circular chevron expander on the right (rows expand to reveal sets). gaps.detail: At 3840 the live accordion rows sit in a centered, width-capped column (large symmetric side margins, roughly the middle half of the viewport), while the clone grid stretches nearly edge-to-edge with px-fluid gutters. At 1440 live rows span close to full width, so the cap engages only at large viewports. This conflicts with the repo's 'no max-w caps' convention, so measure the live container's computed max-width/margins at 3840 via getComputedStyle before changing anything.

/series.notes: Header wordmark difference (phygitals vs Pokenic logo) is the intentional rebrand, not a gap. No cookie banners or region popups in any live shot. live-3840.png is truncated mid-list (ends at the Neo row) — a capture-height artifact, not a content difference; the live list is the same 16 series at all breakpoints. The live '0 / N sets' and '0 / N cards' chips are the anonymous (logged-out) view — the clone must show those zeros, not invented owned counts (per the /fairness precedent, never fabricate logged-in state). Clone source to rebuild: C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/series/page.tsx — currently a hardcoded 8-item mock grid linking to /marketplace; the rebuilt page needs the 16 series logos as assets and an accordion (collapsed-by-default) row component. Desktop live header on this route has no search; the 'Search Series...' input appears only in the 390 header.

gaps.title: Search bar missing under page title

Clone has no search input anywhere on the page — src/app/social/page.tsx goes straight from the header to the tab row.

gaps.title: User card design is a different component (compact list tile vs large profile card)
gaps.detail: Live cards (the page's core content) are large vertical profile cards: 'Lvl NN' badge with star icon top-left; gold-trophy '#N' rank badge top-right; a faint scattered-card artwork banner behind a large centered circular avatar with a green online-status dot; centered username; a bordered 3-column stats strip (Points / Cards / Volume, e.g. '1535.6M Points | 985 Cards | $15.7M Volume'); then a 2x2 button grid: wide 'View Profile' + an icon-only add-friend button, and 'Message' + 'Trade'. Clone cards are compact horizontal tiles: 48px avatar left, username, one small line 'X pts · #N', and three equal-width buttons labeled 'Profile / Message / Trade'. Clone is missing: Lvl badge, trophy rank badge, header artwork band, large avatar treatment, online dot, Cards count, $ Volume, the add-friend icon button; and the primary button copy is 'Profile' instead of 'View Profile'.

gaps.title: Grid columns and 4K container width wrong

Clone caps at lg:grid-cols-3 (src/app/social/page.tsx line 39), giving 3 columns at 1440 AND a full-bleed 3-column stretch at 3840 — clone content spans the whole 3840px viewport where live is a narrow centered column. The exact live max-width and grid gaps must be confirmed via getComputedStyle before fixing (note: the repo's 'no max-w caps anywhere' rule does not hold for live /social).

gaps.title: Filter tab bar style: full-width segmented control vs small inline text tabs

Clone is an auto-width left-aligned inline pill group with text-only tabs, one row at all breakpoints, full-length labels at 390, no icons. Confirm exact segment sizing/colors with getComputedStyle; the icon presence and mobile label text ('All', 'In', 'Out') are certain from pixels.

gaps.title: Clone renders the global site footer; live /social has none

Clone shows the full site footer (logo, description, About Us, Quick Links, Support, Social Media, copyright) because layout.tsx wraps every route in SiteFooter. Fix needs a route-level footer suppression for /social.

gaps.title: Sort control: wrong label, icon, and mobile variant

Clone: a 'Sort: Points' button with chevron, right-aligned on the tab row at all breakpoints (no trend icon, no full-width mobile variant).

Live captures are tall-viewport full-content shots — the large empty dark area below the live grid is the internal scroll container, not a broken render; it also proves the footer is genuinely absent on this route at all three breakpoints (footer comes from src/app/layout.tsx SiteFooter, so the fix needs route-level suppression). gaps.title: Anonymous /earnings renders auth-wall redirect to home instead of the public Earnings Dashboard
gaps.detail: Live phygitals.com/earnings serves a FULL public 'Earnings Dashboard' page to anonymous visitors (header shows Login/Sign Up, so this is the anonymous view) populated with demo data. The clone instead bounces unauthenticated visitors away: src/app/(account)/layout.tsx line 11 does redirect('/?auth=login'), so all three clone shots show the HOME page (hero 'Flip packs. Pull graded cards.', Fresh Pulls, Recent Pulls, leaderboard) dimmed behind the 'Welcome back' login modal. Nothing of the live page exists in the clone's anonymous view. The live page the clone must reproduce, top to bottom: (1) page header — H1 'Earnings Dashboard' + subtitle 'Track your multi-stream income with real-time analytics', with an eye-toggle icon and a '6M' period dropdown (controls sit top-right at 1440/3840, drop below the subtitle at 390); (2) full-width 'Total Earnings' hero card — '$24,567.89' with green '+18.4% vs last month' and a green trend-arrow tile on the right; (3) tab row 'Overview | Analytics | History' (Overview active, pill style); (4) four revenue-stream stat cards — Referrals $8,562.34 / '147 active referrals', Marketplace $12,345.67 / '234 transactions', Claw Machine $2,987.45 / '34.2% win rate', Royalties $672.43 / '28 collections', each with a small colored icon tile; stacked single-column at 390, one 4-across row at 1440/3840; (5) 'Earnings Trend' card — blue gradient bar chart Jan–Jun (~$900–$3600 y-axis) with a green line+dots overlay and a '6 months' label top-right; (6) 'Distribution' card — donut chart with legend Marketplace 50.2%, Referrals 34.8%, Claw Machine 12.1%, Royalties 2.9% (green/blue/purple/yellow segments). At 390 sections 5 and 6 stack full-width; at 1440/3840 they form a two-column row (Trend ~2/3 left, Distribution ~1/3 right). Fix direction: make /earnings publicly reachable (remove/bypass the gate for this route) and build this dashboard view with the live demo copy verbatim.

gaps.title: Clone's hidden logged-in earnings page is a different fabricated design — removing the redirect alone will NOT close the gap
gaps.breakpoints: 390, 1440, 3840 (would appear at all once redirect is removed)
gaps.detail: src/app/(account)/earnings/page.tsx (rendered inside the account-sidebar shell of src/app/(account)/layout.tsx) is a fabricated 'Earnings — Sales, buybacks, and payouts.' page: stat cards Available/Pending/Lifetime/This month, a mock Date/Type/Amount/Status payout table, a 'Withdraw to bank' button, and a DemoNote, beside an AccountSidebar. None of this exists on the live page — live has no account sidebar on /earnings, different headings, different stats, tabs, and two charts (see BLOCKER gap for the exact live structure). The page content must be rebuilt to the live 'Earnings Dashboard' design, not merely un-gated.

/earnings.notes: Surprise finding: live /earnings is NOT auth-walled — phygitals serves a demo-data dashboard to anonymous visitors (live header shows Login/Sign Up at all breakpoints). The demo numbers are obviously canned ($12,345.67 etc.) but they are what live shows and should be copied verbatim. No cookie banners/region popups in any live shot. Clone-3840 shot is viewport-height-ish (home hero + two sections) vs full-page live — capture artifact per known trap (3), not a gap. The /fairness precedent (match the anonymous view) cuts the other way here: the anonymous view IS the dashboard, so the clone's redirect('/?auth=login') in src/app/(account)/layout.tsx:11 is the root cause. Recommend one fresh Playwright re-capture of live /earnings before building, purely to confirm the public dashboard isn't a transient experiment, then: un-gate the route (move it out of the gated (account) group or special-case it) and rebuild page content to the live design. Charts will need a lightweight bar+donut implementation; all copy is in the BLOCKER gap detail.

Visible players in order: LeBron James, Nikola Jokic, Devin Booker, Shaquille O'Neal, Kevin Durant, Giannis Antetokounmpo, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, LaMelo Ball, Bam Adebayo, Vince Carter, Michael Jordan, Scottie Barnes, Luka Doncic, Stephen Curry, Kawhi Leonard (390 scrolls further). gaps.title: Anonymous /messages bounces to homepage + login modal instead of an in-place /messages anonymous state
gaps.detail: Clone: src/app/(account)/layout.tsx line 11 redirect('/?auth=login') sends anonymous visitors to the homepage where the AuthModal opens — all three clone shots show the dimmed homepage (hero, pack rows, Recent Pulls, leaderboard, footer) under a centered 'Welcome back / Log in to your Pokenic account' modal (Google/Discord, email/password, Log in, Sign up). The URL does not stay on /messages and no /messages page shell (header + in-place auth state + footer) is ever rendered anonymously. Live's only observable anonymous account-route pattern (orders/live-1440.png) does the opposite: it STAYS on the route and renders the global header + a full-width red-bordered in-place card ('Failed to Load Orders' / 'Authentication required' / 'Try Again' button) + footer, with no sidebar and no login modal. Live /messages itself could not be captured (busy JS loop pegs headless Chromium), but that busy loop is itself evidence the live route renders in place rather than redirecting home. Plausible fix shape: keep the URL on /messages and render an in-place anonymous state matching the orders-style card (e.g. 'Failed to Load Messages / Authentication required / Try Again'), pending live verification. IMPORTANT: before changing the gate, verify live's actual anonymous /messages view via a workaround capture (headed browser, CDP screenshot with virtual time budget, or blocking the offending polling endpoint) — this gap is inferred from the /orders pattern, not from direct live pixels.

/messages.notes: CAPTURE LIMITATION: no live-*.png exist for /messages — live phygitals.com/messages hard-pegs headless Chromium (busy JS loop, screenshot times out); triaged against the live anonymous account-page pattern from orders/live-1440.png (in-place auth-error card, no sidebar) and referrals/live-1440.png (public page). The single MAJOR gap is therefore an inference, flagged for live verification before fixing. Other observations, not gaps: (1) the clone's logged-in /messages content is fabricated (MOCK_USERS inbox with invented previews + DemoNote in src/app/(account)/messages/page.tsx) — anonymous visitors never see it so it complies with the /fairness precedent on pixels, but it is unverified content if a logged-in audit ever happens; (2) 'Pokenic' brand strings in the modal/title are the deliberate project-wide rebrand (claw-rebrand history), not flagged; (3) clone-3840.png is viewport-height rather than full-page — capture artifact; (4) no cookie banners/popups in any clone shot; (5) the same redirect-to-home gate covers ALL (account) routes, so the sibling /orders triage (which HAS live pixels showing the in-place error card) is the place to confirm this pattern divergence with hard evidence — fixing the (account) layout gate will affect /messages, /orders, /earnings, /settings, etc. together.

gaps.title: Background packs-grid missing behind the overlay
gaps.detail: Live shows multiple rows of pack tiles (157, Curator Selection, Elite, Legend, Fresh Select, Rookie, etc.) filling the viewport, dimmed/blurred and fading to black toward the bottom, behind the centered overlay — clearly visible at all three breakpoints (most obvious at 3840 where ~3 rows of packs span the full width). The clone has no grid at all; it uses a single blurred image blob (/home/hero/ripped-packs/pokemon.webp at 44px blur) inside a rounded hero card on a plain dark page.

gaps.title: Benefit-card copy hierarchy inverted and body copy fabricated
gaps.detail: Live's three cards are titled 'Sign Up' / 'Play Risk Free' / 'Guaranteed Buyback' with descriptions 'Create your account in seconds' / 'Try our $1 claw machine risk free' / 'Keep or sell back for up to $500'. The clone promotes those live descriptions to bold titles and invents new body lines ('Sign up free — no card required to start.', 'Rip your first pack and reveal a real graded card.', 'Hold it, ship it, or sell back instantly at 85–90%.') — see STEPS array, src/app/free/page.tsx lines 19-23. Card-internal layout also differs at 390: live places the icon square to the LEFT of the text (horizontal row card); clone stacks icon above title.

gaps.title: Primary CTA wrong color, copy, and position
gaps.detail: Live: a large green/emerald pill reading 'Sign Up ->' placed BELOW the three benefit cards (full-width at 390, centered fixed-width at 1440/3840). Clone: a white rounded button reading 'Sign Up & Claim Free Pack' placed ABOVE the cards, inside the hero panel (page.tsx lines 62-67). Copy, placement, and order are clear from pixels; confirm the exact green via getComputedStyle on the live button before styling.

gaps.title: Legal consent line missing under the CTA
gaps.detail: Live shows 'By continuing, you agree to Phygital's Privacy Policy and Terms of Service' directly beneath the green Sign Up button, with 'Privacy Policy' and 'Terms of Service' as underlined links (visible at 390 and 3840, and as small text at 1440). The clone has no legal line anywhere on the page.

gaps.title: Logo mark above heading replaced by fabricated 'FREE TO START' pill
gaps.detail: Live renders a circular dark logo badge (Phygitals 'P' mark; clone equivalent would be the Pokenic mark) centered directly above the H1 — clearly visible at 390 and 3840. The clone omits it and instead shows a sparkles + 'FREE TO START' uppercase pill (page.tsx lines 39-41) that does not exist on live.

gaps.title: Fanned row of 5 pack icons added in clone hero — not on live
gaps.detail: Between the subtitle and the CTA the clone shows 5 upright pack icons fanned with rotation/offset (PACKS array + pack-fan div, page.tsx lines 49-61). Live has no such element inside the overlay — pack imagery exists only as the dimmed background grid.

gaps.title: Site footer present on clone but absent on live /free
gaps.detail: Clone renders the full site footer (logo, about blurb, About Us button, Quick Links, Support, Social Media, copyright) at the bottom of /free at every breakpoint. Live's page ends with the dimmed pack grid fading to black — no footer is visible in any live capture (the overlay state appears to suppress/lock the page). Verify on the live DOM that the footer is truly absent (not just below the fold) before removing.

gaps.title: Mobile header missing '?', Login, and Sign Up controls
gaps.detail: Live 390 header (top of page): hamburger button on the LEFT, logo next to it, then '?' help button, 'Login' button, and 'Sign Up' button on the right. Clone 390 header: logo on the left and a lone hamburger on the right — no help/Login/Sign Up buttons. This is the global SiteHeader, so it likely affects every route, but it is plainly visible on this page's pixels.

gaps.title: Subtitle trailing period delta
gaps.detail: Clone subtitle reads 'Join thousands of collectors pulling rare cards daily.' with a trailing period (page.tsx line 46); the live subtitle appears to end without a period ('...rare cards daily'). Screenshot resolution makes the period hard to confirm — check the live DOM text before editing.

gaps.title: H1 typography may differ from live
gaps.detail: Clone H1 uses font-heading (Nekst Black) with tight tracking; the live overlay heading looks like a more conventional bold sans with looser tracking, most noticeable at 3840. Could be a false positive at screenshot resolution — must be confirmed with getComputedStyle (font-family, weight, letter-spacing, size) on the live heading before changing anything.

/free.notes: Live /free is effectively an account-gating signup overlay rendered over the dimmed packs-grid page (same class as the /fairness precedent) — the fixer should rebuild the page as: dimmed/blurred pack-tile grid background + centered overlay (logo mark, H1, subtitle, 3 benefit cards with live's title/description hierarchy, green 'Sign Up ->' CTA, legal line), and drop the fabricated hero pill, pack fan, white CTA, and footer. Branding deltas (Pokenic logo/wordmark vs Phygitals) are the intentional repo-wide rebrand and were NOT counted as gaps; note the clone footer still says 'PHYGITALS' in the copyright, irrelevant here since the footer itself should go. No cookie banners or region popups appeared in any live capture. Clone source confirming the fabrication: C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/free/page.tsx (STEPS fabricated copy lines 19-23, pill lines 39-41, pack fan lines 49-61, white CTA lines 62-67).

gaps.title: Anonymous /orders redirects to home + login modal instead of rendering the live 'Failed to Load Orders' error card
gaps.detail: LIVE (all breakpoints): visitor stays on /orders and sees, between the standard site header and footer, a single full-width red-bordered card on a near-black maroon background containing (top to bottom, centered): a red circular exclamation icon, bold white heading 'Failed to Load Orders', red/salmon subtext 'Authentication required', and a red pill button 'Try Again' with a refresh icon. Nothing else on the page — no sidebar, no orders table, no login modal. CLONE (all breakpoints): src/app/(account)/layout.tsx line 11 redirect('/?auth=login') bounces anonymous visitors to the HOMEPAGE, which renders dimmed (hero 'Flip packs. Pull graded cards.', Featured Packs, Recent Pulls, leaderboard) behind a centered 'Welcome back' login modal (Google/Discord buttons, Email, Password, Forgot password?, Log in, 'New to Pokenic? Sign up'). Wrong URL, wrong page content, wrong auth pattern. FIX: anonymous /orders must render the error-card view in place — header + red error card ('Failed to Load Orders' / 'Authentication required' / 'Try Again') + footer — matching the /fairness precedent of cloning the anonymous view. The page.tsx empty/table states (src/app/(account)/orders/page.tsx) are never reachable anonymously and are fabricated logged-in content as the anonymous view.

gaps.title: Error-card geometry/colors need measurement when building the fix
gaps.detail: Once the error-card view is built, its exact values must come from getComputedStyle on live, not from the PNGs: card border color/width and radius (reads as ~1px red border, large radius), card background (very dark maroon), card width behavior (390: full width inside the page gutter; 1440: full width inside gutter, ~315px tall; 3840: card does NOT span the gutter — it is a centered, width-capped block roughly a third of the viewport wide), heading font (appears Nekst/heading bold white), subtext color (light red), button color/radius (saturated red pill), and vertical paddings. Flagged here so the fixer measures rather than eyeballs.

/orders.notes: Live shots are clean: no cookie banner/region popup at any breakpoint. The live anonymous view of /orders is itself an error state ('Failed to Load Orders' + 'Authentication required') — that IS the canonical anonymous view per the audit rubric, so the clone must reproduce the error card, not a login wall. Clone screenshot heights differ wildly (clone-390 is ~6048px tall) because the clone redirected to the full homepage — capture artifact of the redirect, not a separate gap. Clone source: src/app/(account)/orders/page.tsx (orders table + 'No orders yet' empty state — unreachable anonymously) and src/app/(account)/layout.tsx (line 11 redirect('/?auth=login') is the root cause). The modal copy 'Pokenic' vs live 'phygitals' was not logged as a separate gap because the modal itself should not appear on this route once fixed; if the modal is shared with other audited routes, handle branding there.

gaps.title: Hero missing 'Support team online' status pill
gaps.detail: Live shows a rounded pill badge with a green dot and the text 'Support team online' directly above the 'How can we help?' H1 at every breakpoint. The clone hero (src/app/contact/page.tsx, section 1 HERO) has no badge at all — the H1 is the first element.

gaps.title: Hero wrapped in a card; live hero is plain background with large whitespace
gaps.detail: Clone renders the hero inside a rounded-2xl bordered card with a white/5 top gradient (page.tsx line 29-30), starting immediately below the header. Live has NO card around the hero — badge/heading/subtitle/button sit on the plain page background, with much larger vertical whitespace above the badge (~150px below header at 1440) and a large gap (~180px) between the CTA button and the VAULT STATUS section. Exact paddings must be measured on live before rebuilding.

gaps.title: Page layout: live single centered column, clone two-column grid
gaps.detail: Live stacks three sections vertically in one centered content column (~670px wide at both 1440 and 3840): hero, then Vault Status, then FAQ. Clone uses a max-w-5xl container and puts Vault Status and FAQ side-by-side in a md:grid-cols-2 grid (page.tsx line 49), making the content area ~975px at 1440 and ~900px at 3840. Live column width should be confirmed via getComputedStyle before rebuilding. Note: max-w-5xl also violates the repo's no-max-w full-bleed convention (px-fluid only).

gaps.title: Vault Status content fabricated — wrong data on every vault
gaps.detail: Live vault cards each show: vault name top-left, a green-dot location badge top-right ('DE, USA' for Vault 1 and 2, 'OR, USA' for Vault 3), then two icon rows — clock icon + '2 business days' and truck/shipping icon + '2-7 business days' (identical for all three vaults). Clone instead shows a pulsing green dot + vault name on the left and fabricated right-aligned text 'Operational' (emerald) over '5–7 day processing' / '7–10 day processing' (page.tsx VAULTS array, lines 10-14). None of the clone's status/processing copy exists on live.

gaps.title: Vault Status structure: live three separate horizontal cards with external uppercase label
gaps.detail: Live: a small uppercase muted label 'VAULT STATUS' with 'Current processing & shipping times' beneath it sits OUTSIDE/above the cards (left-aligned to the content column, no icon), followed by three separate bordered cards in a horizontal row at 1440/3840 (stacked vertically at 390). Clone: one parent card titled 'Vault Status' in heading font with a Vault lucide icon inside the card, containing three stacked list rows (page.tsx lines 51-79). Section header style, icon, and card grouping all differ.

gaps.title: FAQ presentation: live accordion container with dividers and down-chevrons; clone pill links with right-chevrons
gaps.detail: Live: small uppercase 'FAQ' label + 'Common questions answered' OUTSIDE the card, then ONE bordered container holding all six questions as full-width rows separated by hairline dividers, each with a chevron-DOWN on the right (collapsed accordion). Clone: a card titled 'FAQ' with a HelpCircle icon inside, and each question rendered as its own rounded bordered pill that links to /how-it-works with a chevron-RIGHT (page.tsx lines 82-103). The six question strings themselves match live exactly. Live rows are likely expandable accordions, not links — verify behavior on live.

gaps.title: Hero subtitle has trailing period not on live
gaps.detail: Live subtitle: 'Our team typically responds within a few minutes' (no trailing period). Clone (page.tsx line 35): 'Our team typically responds within a few minutes.' (with period).

gaps.title: 'Start a conversation' button missing trailing arrow icon
gaps.detail: Live button shows speech-bubble icon + 'Start a conversation' + a right-arrow icon after the label. Clone button (page.tsx lines 38-44) has only the speech icon + label, no trailing ArrowRight. Also note clone wires it to mailto:hello@phygitals.com — live likely opens a chat widget; behavior not verifiable from pixels.

gaps.title: Mobile header missing help/Login/Sign Up buttons and hamburger on wrong side
gaps.detail: Live 390 header (shared SiteHeader, visible at top of page): hamburger button at far LEFT, then logo mark, then a circular '?' how-it-works button, a 'Login' button, and a 'Sign Up' button at right. Clone 390 header: wordmark at left and a bare hamburger at far right — no '?', no Login, no Sign Up. Shared component (src/components SiteHeader), so this likely affects every route.

gaps.title: Footer first social icon: Twitter bird vs X glyph
gaps.detail: Live footer Social Media row's first icon is the legacy Twitter BIRD; the clone renders the X logo. Shared SiteFooter component.

gaps.title: Footer Social Media column order swapped (icons vs paragraph)
gaps.detail: Live footer Social Media column order: 'Social Media' heading, then the 'Follow us on social media…' paragraph, then the icon row. Clone: heading, then icon row, then paragraph. Shared SiteFooter component.

/contact.notes: Right page, no auth wall on live (/contact is public). Clone source C:/Users/PC/Desktop/Projects/Pokenic_Game/src/app/contact/page.tsx was clearly built from memory/interpretation, not from a measured spec — the fixer should recon live /contact with the scripts/*.mjs Playwright flow first. NOT gaps: Pokenic vs phygitals logo (intentional rebrand, header + footer); the footer copyright line '© 2025 PHYGITALS. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.' — confirmed present on live via the 3840 shot (it is cropped/invisible in the live 390/1440 shots), and the clone matches it including the PHYGITALS wording; minor capture-height differences. No cookie banners/popups in any live shot. FAQ question copy and footer link columns (Quick Links/Support) match live exactly.
